post_excerpt: ঢাকা-চট্টগ্রাম মহাসড়কের মধ্যবর্তী স্থানে, বৃহত্তর কুমিল্লা ও নোয়াখালী অঞ্চলের মানুষের জন্য আধুনিক চিকিৎসা সেবা নিশ্চিত করার এবং ক্রমবর্ধমান জনসংখ্যার সঙ্গে তাল মিলিয়ে গ্র্যাজুয়েট ডাক্তার তৈরি করার উদ্দেশ্যে কুমিল্লায় একটি মেডিকেল কলেজ ও হাসপাতাল স্থাপনের পরিকল্পনা গ্রহণ করা হয়। এর জন্য…
post_content:
ঢাকা-চট্টগ্রাম মহাসড়কের মধ্যবর্তী স্থানে, বৃহত্তর কুমিল্লা ও নোয়াখালী অঞ্চলের মানুষের জন্য আধুনিক চিকিৎসা সেবা নিশ্চিত করার এবং ক্রমবর্ধমান জনসংখ্যার সঙ্গে তাল মিলিয়ে গ্র্যাজুয়েট ডাক্তার তৈরি করার উদ্দেশ্যে কুমিল্লায় একটি মেডিকেল কলেজ ও হাসপাতাল স্থাপনের পরিকল্পনা গ্রহণ করা হয়। এর জন্য ১৯৭৯ সালে ম্যাটস্ সংলগ্ন ১৫ একর জমি অধিগ্রহণ করে ২৮শে নভেম্বর কুমিল্লা মেডিকেল কলেজ ও হাসপাতালের ভিত্তিপ্রস্তর স্থাপন করা হয়।

১৯৮১-৮২ শিক্ষাবর্ষে প্রথমবারের মতো ৫০ জন ছাত্র-ছাত্রীকে এমবিবিএস ১ম বর্ষে ভর্তি করিয়ে মেডিকেল কলেজের কার্যক্রম শুরু হয়। পরবর্তীতে সরকারি সিদ্ধান্তে মেডিকেল কলেজের কার্যক্রম স্থগিত করে ওই একই জায়গায় ২৫০ শয্যার হাসপাতাল নির্মাণের কাজ শুরু হয়। ১৯৮৭ সালে হাসপাতালের নির্মাণ কাজ শুরু হয়ে ১৯৯১ সালে তা শেষ হয়, এবং ১১ই জানুয়ারি ১৯৯২ সালে কুমিল্লা মেডিকেল কলেজ হাসপাতাল চালু হয়।

কোমলিকের শিক্ষার্থীদের ক্লিনিক্যাল প্রশিক্ষণের জন্য হাসপাতালটি মেডিকেল কলেজ হাসপাতালে রূপান্তরিত করা হয়, এবং কোনো অবকাঠামোগত পরিবর্তন ছাড়াই হাসপাতালটির নাম পরিবর্তন করে “কুমিল্লা মেডিকেল কলেজ হাসপাতাল” রাখা হয়। বর্তমানে, কুমিল্লা মেডিকেল কলেজ হাসপাতাল একটি পূর্ণাঙ্গ মেডিকেল কলেজ হাসপাতাল হিসেবে প্রতিষ্ঠিত, এবং এর অবকাঠামোগত উন্নয়ন শেষ করে ২৪ জুলাই ২০০৮ তারিখে এটি হস্তান্তর করা হয়। এখানে মেডিকেল কলেজের ছাত্র-ছাত্রীরা ছাড়াও বিভিন্ন সেবা ইনস্টিটিউটের শিক্ষার্থীরা হাতে কলমে প্রশিক্ষণ নিচ্ছেন।
address: Kuchaitoli, Dr Akhtar Hameed Khan Rd, Sadar, Comilla, 3500

post_content:
গোমতী হাসপাতাল ২০০১ সালে প্রতিষ্ঠিত হলেও এর প্রতিষ্ঠাতা ডাঃ মজিবুর রহমান কুমিল্লায় প্রথম ক্লিনিক স্থাপন করে চিকিৎসা সেবায় নতুন দিগন্ত উন্মোচন করেন। তার উদ্যোগে কিছু চিকিৎসক বন্ধুদের সহযোগিতায় হাসপাতালটি শুরু হয়। হাসপাতালটি তার “স্বল্প মূল্যে উন্নত স্বাস্থ্য সেবা” শ্লোগান দিয়ে ইতোমধ্যে কুমিল্লা ও নোয়াখালী অঞ্চলের মানুষের আস্থা অর্জন করেছে।

এখানে স্বাস্থ্য সেবার সকল বিভাগে বিশেষজ্ঞ ডাক্তাররা রোগী সেবা প্রদান করেন। যদিও শুরুতে অস্থায়ী ভাড়া বাড়ীতে কার্যক্রম চলছিল, তবে বর্তমানে হাসপাতালটি স্থায়ী ভবনের দিকে এগিয়ে যাচ্ছে। গোমতী হাসপাতাল এখন ১২ তলা বিশিষ্ট একটি আধুনিক ভবনের কার্যক্রম শুরু করেছে, যার মাধ্যমে এটি আরো উন্নত সেবা প্রদান করতে সক্ষম হবে।

গোমতী হাসপাতালের উদ্দেশ্য একটাই—কুমিল্লা এবং আশেপাশের অঞ্চলের মানুষকে কম খরচে ভালো চিকিৎসা সেবা দেওয়া। হাসপাতালটি তাদের সেবা কার্যক্রম চালিয়ে যাচ্ছে “সেবা নিন, সুস্থ্য থাকুন” এই স্লোগান নিয়ে এবং ভবিষ্যতেও এই প্রচেষ্টা অব্যাহত থাকবে।

Rajshahi, historically known as Rampur Boalia and famously nicknamed “Silkcity”, is located on the north bank of the Padma River. The city lies in the ancient region of Pundra Vardhana, a place rich in history and culture. Rajshahi is blessed by the mazar of Sufi Saint Hazrat Shah Mukhdam, making it a significant spiritual center as well.

The city is renowned for its silk and mangoes, which are its main attractions, drawing not only local visitors but also people from abroad. Rajshahi is widely known across the country as the city of education, and as part of this legacy, the Rajshahi Medical College and Rajshahi Medical College Hospital were established in 1958. Since then, this hospital has been serving as a vital healthcare hub for the entire northern region of Bangladesh, providing high-quality medical care to people across the area.

post_content:
Welcome to Rangpur Community Medical College Hospital (Doctor’s Community Hospital Pvt. Ltd.), a healthcare institution born from the vision of Dr. Md. Mofizuddin Sarker to provide top-notch medical education and establish a model hospital for the underserved and impoverished communities of North Bengal.

In 1975, Dr. Md. Mofizuddin Sarker laid the foundation by opening Nazimuddin Poly Clinic in Rangpur, which was the first of its kind in North Bengal. Following his passing, his family and passionate individuals from Rangpur worked together to turn his dream into reality. In 2000, they established the Doctors Community Hospital Pvt. Ltd., a 100-bed facility, under the leadership of his son, Mr. Md. Nazmul Ahasan Sarker, to continue his legacy of serving the people.

In response to the growing demand for dental surgeons both domestically and internationally, the Rangpur Dental College was founded in 2001. As the first private dental college in North Bengal, the institution has become a symbol of excellence, attracting students not only from Bangladesh but also from neighboring countries like Nepal, India, and the Maldives. The Ministry of Health, Government of Bangladesh, has recognized Rangpur Dental College as the “Best Private Dental College” in the country.

In 2008, the institution expanded its offerings by introducing an MBBS course, ensuring the highest standards of medical education. Today, 50% of the students enrolled in our programs come from various countries, further solidifying our international reputation.

We invite you to explore our state-of-the-art facilities and the legacy of excellence at Rangpur Community Medical College Hospital, where medical care, education, and compassion go hand in hand.

post_content:
হাসপাতাল হলো এমন একটি স্বাস্থ্যসেবা প্রতিষ্ঠান যা রোগীদের চিকিৎসা প্রদান করতে চিকিৎসক, নার্সিং কর্মী এবং চিকিৎসা সরঞ্জামাদি ব্যবহার করে। হাসপাতালের প্রধান উদ্দেশ্য হলো রোগীদের সঠিক চিকিৎসা প্রদান করা, বিশেষত যখন তারা হঠাৎ অসুস্থ হয় বা দুর্ঘটনার শিকার হয়।

হাসপাতালের মধ্যে সবচেয়ে পরিচিত ধরনের হলো সাধারণ হাসপাতাল, যেখানে জরুরি বিভাগ থাকে, যা হঠাৎ অসুস্থতা বা দুর্ঘটনার শিকারদের জন্য জরুরি চিকিৎসা সেবা প্রদান করে। জেলা হাসপাতাল সাধারণত একটি অঞ্চলের প্রধান স্বাস্থ্যসেবা কেন্দ্র হিসেবে কাজ করে, যেখানে পর্যাপ্ত বিছানা এবং দীর্ঘমেয়াদী চিকিৎসা সেবার জন্য অতিরিক্ত ব্যবস্থা থাকে।

এছাড়াও, বিশেষ হাসপাতাল রয়েছে, যা নির্দিষ্ট স্বাস্থ্য সমস্যা বা রোগের জন্য বিশেষায়িত। এর মধ্যে ট্রমা সেন্টার, পুনর্বাসন হাসপাতাল, শিশু হাসপাতাল, সিনিয়রস (জেরিয়াট্রিক) হাসপাতাল, এবং মানসিক স্বাস্থ্য হাসপাতাল অন্তর্ভুক্ত। বিশেষ হাসপাতালগুলি সাধারণ হাসপাতালের তুলনায় স্বাস্থ্যসেবা খরচ কমাতে সহায়ক হতে পারে, কারণ এগুলি নির্দিষ্ট রোগ বা অবস্থার জন্য বিশেষজ্ঞ সেবা প্রদান করে।

হাসপাতালগুলি তাদের প্রাপ্তির উত্স অনুযায়ী সাধারণ, বিশেষ, বা সরকারি হিসেবে শ্রেণীবদ্ধ করা হয়, এবং এই শ্রেণীবিভাগের মাধ্যমে তাদের সেবা এবং সেবার মান নির্ধারিত হয়।

post_excerpt: Khulna Medical College (KMC), established in 1990, is a prominent medical institution in Bangladesh, housing the Khulna Medical College and Hospital, also known as the "250-bed hospital." Located at the entrance to the city, near the Khulna inter-district bus stand,…
post_content:
Khulna Medical College (KMC), established in 1990, is a prominent medical institution in Bangladesh, housing the Khulna Medical College and Hospital, also known as the “250-bed hospital.” Located at the entrance to the city, near the Khulna inter-district bus stand, this college has made remarkable progress in medical education since its inception.

Originally known as the 250-bed hospital before 1989, the idea to establish a medical college took shape in the same year, leading to the formation of KMC. Though it started with limited infrastructure and a small group of students, the institution quickly grew and began offering undergraduate training, along with Post Graduate Training (PGT) in its hospital.

Today, KMC is affiliated with Rajshahi University and is one of the nine government and private medical colleges under its banner. Upon completing the 5-year MBBS program and passing the final professional exam, students receive their MBBS degree from Rajshahi University. The college operates under the governance of the Bangladesh Medical and Dental Council (BMDC), which is affiliated with the Ministry of Health. Professional examinations are conducted under the University, with regular internal assessments such as card completions and term-end evaluations.

The college boasts modern facilities to support both education and training. The academic building, located next to the hospital building, is a four-story structure that houses the administrative and academic sections. All the essential departments, including offices, student sections, and principal offices, are located here. There are classrooms, galleries, a library, and an audio-visual unit for educational purposes, as well as four large galleries for combined classes.

To accommodate students, KMC provides six hostels: two for boys, one for girls, and three for intern doctors. The girls’ hostel and one of the boys’ hostels are four-storied. Additionally, there are staff quarters for both the college and hospital personnel within the campus.

With its excellent educational infrastructure, KMC is committed to producing highly skilled healthcare professionals while providing quality medical services to the region.
address: Chhoto Boyra, Khulna, Khulna, Khulna Sadar, Khulna, 9100

post_title: Sher E Bangla Medical College Hospital | Barisal
post_excerpt: Sher-e-Bangla Medical College (SBMC), established in 1968, is a renowned government medical school in Barisal, Bangladesh. Affiliated with the University of Dhaka as a constituent college, it has become a cornerstone in medical education, training, and healthcare in the region.…
post_content:
Sher-e-Bangla Medical College (SBMC), established in 1968, is a renowned government medical school in Barisal, Bangladesh. Affiliated with the University of Dhaka as a constituent college, it has become a cornerstone in medical education, training, and healthcare in the region.

Key Highlights:

  • Location: Barisal, Bangladesh
  • Affiliation: University of Dhaka
  • Degrees Offered: MBBS
  • Hospital Capacity: 1000 beds
  • Campus Size: 81.545 acres

Overview:

Sher-e-Bangla Medical College is dedicated to providing high-quality medical education, training, and research opportunities. The college’s hospital is fully equipped to provide comprehensive healthcare services, with a capacity of 1000 beds. This makes it one of the largest government medical institutions in the region, offering both inpatient and outpatient services.

The MBBS degree awarded by SBMC, especially those received from October 1984 onward, is recognized internationally, including eligibility for registration with the General Medical Council (GMC) in the United Kingdom.

Facilities:

  • Dormitories for Students: Separate dormitories for male and female students.
  • Nurses’ Training Institute: A dedicated facility for nursing students.
  • Residences for Staff: Faculty housing and staff residences are also available on campus.
  • Research and Training: The college is known for its medical research facilities and ongoing professional training programs.

History:

  • Foundation: The construction of the medical college began on 6 November 1964, initially known as Barisal Medical College.
  • Inception: It opened its doors to students in 1968.
  • Renaming: In 1977, the college was renamed Sher-e-Bangla Medical College, in honor of A. K. Fazlul Huq, a prominent leader and former prime minister from Barisal, who was affectionately known as “Sher-e-Bangla”, meaning “The Tiger of Bengal”.

SBMC continues to play a pivotal role in providing medical education and healthcare to the people of Barisal and beyond, contributing significantly to the development of the medical profession in Bangladesh.

post_content:
ময়মনসিংহ মেডিকেল কলেজ হাসপাতাল ১৯৬২ ইং সালে ৮৩ একর জমির মধ্যে প্রতিষ্ঠিত হয়। হাসপাতালটি তার যাত্রা শুরু করেছিল ৩০০ শয্যা নিয়ে এবং তখন প্রতিদিন ৮০০ থেকে ১০০০ রোগী ভর্তি হয়ে চিকিৎসা গ্রহণ করতেন। সেই সময় হাসপাতালটির মূল ইউনিট ছিল মাত্র ১০টি। তবে, চিকিৎসা সরঞ্জামাদি এবং অন্যান্য প্রয়োজনীয় সেবা সঙ্কুলান না থাকায়, চিকিৎসার পরিপূর্ণতা তখন অর্জন করা সম্ভব হয়নি।

বর্তমানে ময়মনসিংহ মেডিকেল কলেজ হাসপাতাল একটি টার্সিয়ারী লেভেল এবং একাডেমিক হাসপাতাল হিসেবে পরিচিত। নবগঠিত ময়মনসিংহ বিভাগ সহ আশেপাশের বিভিন্ন জেলার প্রায় আড়াই কোটি জনগণের সরকারী বিশেষজ্ঞ চিকিৎসার একমাত্র ভরসাস্থল হয়ে উঠেছে এই হাসপাতাল।

২০১০ সালে ৮ তলা বিশিষ্ট নতুন ভবন স্থাপিত হয়, এবং ২০১৩ সালের জানুয়ারী মাসে মাননীয় প্রধানমন্ত্রী শেখ হাসিনা কর্তৃক নতুন হাসপাতাল ভবন উদ্বোধনের মাধ্যমে চিকিৎসাসেবা সম্প্রসারিত হয়। বর্তমানে এই হাসপাতালটি ১০০০ শয্যায় উন্নীত হয়েছে এবং এর ৩৩টি বিভাগ/ওয়ার্ডে প্রতিদিন গড়ে ৩০০০-৩৫০০ রোগী চিকিৎসাসেবা পাচ্ছে। বহির্বিভাগে বর্তমানে ৩০০০-৪০০০ রোগী চিকিৎসা গ্রহণ করেন।

আমি, ১.১১.২০১৫ ইং তারিখে পরিচালক হিসেবে ময়মনসিংহ মেডিকেল কলেজ হাসপাতালে যোগদান করার পর থেকে, রোগীদের সুষ্ঠু চিকিৎসা সেবার ক্ষেত্রে নিম্নে বর্ণিত সমস্যাগুলি সমাধান করতে সক্ষম হয়েছি:

(এখানে আপনি পরবর্তীতে সমস্যাগুলি ও সমাধানসমূহের বিবরণ দিতে পারেন, যদি প্রয়োজন হয়।)

post_excerpt: The National Institute of Mental Health and Hospital is one of the prominent institutions under the Ministry of Health and Family Welfare in Bangladesh. It is the only government-run mental hospital and mental health institution in Dhaka. Mental Hospital |…
post_content:
The National Institute of Mental Health and Hospital is one of the prominent institutions under the Ministry of Health and Family Welfare in Bangladesh. It is the only government-run mental hospital and mental health institution in Dhaka.

Mental Hospital | Pabna, located in Hemayetpur village of Pabna District, is a 500-bed facility that has been serving the community for many years. When it was first established, it was the only specialized mental hospital in the region.

The hospital was founded by Mohammad Hossain Ganguly in Hemayetpur. Initially, it was set up by the Civil Surgeon in 1957 in the Shitlai Landlord’s palace in the city. However, just two years later, the hospital was relocated to a new site in Hemayetpur village. This land was acquired, and Anukulchandra Chakravarty was compensated for it. The new hospital building was constructed on 111.25 acres of land.

Initially a 60-bed hospital, the facility expanded over the next several years. After nine years, the hospital increased its capacity to 90 beds. In 1996, the hospital underwent a major transformation and was upgraded to a 500-bed psychiatric hospital, with an additional 300 beds added over time.

In July 2020, the hospital faced a significant challenge when 22 people at the hospital, including 12 patients, tested positive for COVID-19. As a result, the hospital had to reduce its services during the pandemic to ensure the safety of patients and staff.

Despite these challenges, Mental Hospital | Pabna continues to play a crucial role in providing mental health care and services to the community.

post_content:
সাইক গ্রুপ বাংলাদেশের অন্যতম সনামধন্য গ্রুপ অব কোম্পানি। স্বাস্থ্য সেবার উন্নয়নে এবং সাধারণ মানুষের জন্য উন্নত চিকিৎসা সেবা নিশ্চিত করার লক্ষ্যে সাইক গ্রুপ প্রতিষ্ঠা করেছে সাইক জেনারেল হাসপাতাল। হাসপাতালের প্রতিষ্ঠাতা, আবু হাসনাত মোঃ ইয়াহিয়া (চেয়ারম্যান) এবং সোহেলী ইয়াসমিন (ম্যানেজিং ডিরেক্টর) এই উদ্যোগ গ্রহণ করেন।

সাইক জেনারেল হাসপাতাল বগুড়ার ঠনঠনিয়া ভাই পাগলা মাজারের দক্ষিণ পার্শ্বে অবস্থিত এবং এটি শুরু থেকেই সঠিক স্বাস্থ্য সেবা নিশ্চিত করার মাধ্যমে সুনাম অর্জন করেছে। হাসপাতালটিতে দেশের নামী সরকারি ও বেসরকারি হাসপাতালের ডাক্তারগণ নিয়মিত সেবা দিয়ে আসছেন, যা তার সুনাম এবং বিশ্বাসযোগ্যতা আরও বৃদ্ধি করেছে।

হাসপাতালটিতে রয়েছে অত্যাধুনিক মেডিকেল ল্যাবরেটরি এবং রোগীদের সঠিক রোগ নির্ণয়ের জন্য দক্ষ মেডিকেল টেকনোলজিস্ট। এছাড়া, বাংলাদেশ স্বাস্থ্য অধিদপ্তর অনুমোদিত সাইক জেনারেল হাসপাতাল স্বাস্থ্য অধিদপ্তরের সকল নিয়ম-কানুন মেনে পরিচালিত হয়ে আসছে, এবং এর কার্যক্রম সাইক গ্রুপ এর পরিচালনা পরিষদের মাধ্যমে পরিচালিত হয়।

সাইক জেনারেল হাসপাতাল বাংলাদেশের স্বাস্থ্য সেবায় গুরুত্বপূর্ণ ভূমিকা পালন করছে এবং ভবিষ্যতে আরও উন্নত সেবা প্রদান করে স্বাস্থ্য খাতে তার অবদান অব্যাহত রাখবে।

post_excerpt: Shaheed Ziaur Rahman Medical College (Bengali: শহীদ জিয়াউর রহমান মেডিকেল কলেজ হাসপাতাল) is a prominent government medical school in Bangladesh, established in 1992. Located in Bogura town, it is affiliated with the University of Rajshahi and offers a comprehensive 5-year…
post_content:
Shaheed Ziaur Rahman Medical College (Bengali: শহীদ জিয়াউর রহমান মেডিকেল কলেজ হাসপাতাল) is a prominent government medical school in Bangladesh, established in 1992. Located in Bogura town, it is affiliated with the University of Rajshahi and offers a comprehensive 5-year MBBS program. Upon graduation, students must complete a one-year internship, which is mandatory for obtaining the degree, which is recognized by the Bangladesh Medical and Dental Council (BMDC).

The college’s affiliated hospital has a total floor space of 91,922.02 square meters and a 500-bed capacity, with an additional 200-300 extra beds. The facilities are divided between the College building, which houses preclinical and para-clinical disciplines, and the Hospital building, where clinical disciplines are taught.

Key facilities in the College building include:

  • Gallery I, II, III & IV
  • Tutorial Rooms
  • Dissection Hall
  • Practical Classrooms
  • Laboratories and Museums
  • Medical Education Unit
  • Medical Skill Centre
  • Autopsy Morgue
  • Seminar Rooms
  • Air-conditioned Library
  • Computer Lab

Shaheed Ziaur Rahman Medical College strives to provide quality education and training to future doctors, with state-of-the-art facilities and a strong focus on medical skills development.

post_title: TMSS Medical College & Rafatullah Community Hospital
post_excerpt: TMSS Medical College and Rafatullah Community Hospital (TMC & RCH) is a key institution within the TMSS Health Sector. Established in 1995 by Professor Dr. Hosne-Ara Begum, the founding Executive Director of TMSS, Rafatullah Community Hospital (RCH) was created with…
post_content:
TMSS Medical College and Rafatullah Community Hospital (TMC & RCH) is a key institution within the TMSS Health Sector. Established in 1995 by Professor Dr. Hosne-Ara Begum, the founding Executive Director of TMSS, Rafatullah Community Hospital (RCH) was created with the financial assistance of Terre des Hommes-Netherlands. The hospital was founded with the vision of providing affordable healthcare services to the poor and rural populations of Northern Bangladesh.

Initially starting as a 10-bed hospital in 1995, the hospital grew rapidly to meet the increasing healthcare needs of the community. In 2008, in line with the operational policies of the Medical College, the hospital was upgraded to a 250-bed facility and renamed TMSS Medical College and Rafatullah Community Hospital (TMC & RCH) to also serve as a hub for clinical education.

Today, the hospital has expanded to 850 beds and is equipped with modern medical instruments and facilities, providing round-the-clock services, including emergency care for both indoor and outdoor patients. The hospital continues to grow and, in its final phase, will offer 1000 beds in a 19-story building, with the goal of providing comprehensive medical and surgical services to the community.

With its ongoing commitment to improving healthcare access and quality in Northern Bangladesh, TMC & RCH continues to play a critical role in delivering essential health services to underserved populations.
address: Rangpur Hwy, Thengamara, Bogura, Bogra Sadar, Bogra, 5800

  • Operation Theater: Equipped for performing both routine and complex surgeries, ensuring patients receive safe and effective surgical care.
  • Ward & Cabin: Comfortable and well-maintained patient rooms, including general wards and private cabins, providing a peaceful and healing environment.

  • Dental: Offering a full range of dental services, from preventive care to treatments for various dental conditions.
  • Ophthalmology: Providing specialized care for eye-related issues, including vision tests, treatments, and surgeries.
  • Emergency: The hospital’s emergency department is open 24/7 to handle urgent medical cases and provide immediate care.
  • Radiology & Imaging: Advanced diagnostic tools like X-rays, ultrasounds, and CT scans to help in accurate diagnosis and treatment planning.
  • Pharmacy: Well-stocked with a variety of medicines, providing both prescription and over-the-counter medications to patients.
  • Laboratory: A full-service laboratory offering a wide range of tests to assist in diagnosing and monitoring medical conditions.
  • ICU (Intensive Care Unit): Equipped for critical care, providing intensive monitoring and treatment for patients with severe medical conditions.
  • Dialysis: Offering kidney dialysis services for patients with renal issues, providing compassionate care and support during treatment.

With its patient-centered approach and modern facilities, SIBL Foundation Hospital aims to deliver comprehensive healthcare in a safe, caring, and professional environment.

post_excerpt: In Bangladesh, the healthcare system faces several significant challenges. Among the most notable are medical errors, which some studies suggest are the eighth leading cause of death in the country. Along with that, there's the rising cost of healthcare, which…
post_content:
In Bangladesh, the healthcare system faces several significant challenges. Among the most notable are medical errors, which some studies suggest are the eighth leading cause of death in the country. Along with that, there’s the rising cost of healthcare, which has become a major concern. Currently, healthcare spending accounts for about one-sixth of Bangladesh’s gross domestic product (GDP), and it’s growing at a much faster rate than the economy itself. This rapid increase in healthcare costs poses a serious threat to the financial stability of the government, businesses, and individuals who are left to bear the burden.

Despite the high spending, an alarming 40 million people in Bangladesh still have no access to health insurance, which further exacerbates the issue. This creates a huge gap in coverage and access to necessary medical services for a large portion of the population.

post_title: Bangladesh University of Health Sciences | BUHS
post_excerpt: Bangladesh University of Health Sciences (BUHS) was established in mid-2012 with a vision to carry forward the philanthropic values of National Professor Dr. Muhammad Ibrahim, the founder of the Diabetic Association of Bangladesh (BADAS). BUHS is the first private university…
post_content:
Bangladesh University of Health Sciences (BUHS) was established in mid-2012 with a vision to carry forward the philanthropic values of National Professor Dr. Muhammad Ibrahim, the founder of the Diabetic Association of Bangladesh (BADAS). BUHS is the first private university in Bangladesh to focus specifically on health sciences education, aiming to bring innovative approaches to the field. Its goal is to produce skilled health professionals who are equipped to meet global health challenges and serve humanity.

The idea of creating a university dedicated to health sciences became a reality with the support of the government, who provided a large plot of land in Mirpur, Dhaka. The university also benefited from the Health Care Development Project (HCDP), a joint initiative between Bangladesh and the Netherlands. This project led to the establishment of the Bangladesh Institute of Health Sciences and Hospital (BIHS), the predecessor of BUHS. Over five years, BIHS offered MPhil and MPH programs in public health, along with MS in Laboratory Technology and MHI in Health Informatics. These programs were taught by dedicated faculty from BIRDEM and other esteemed institutions. The Institute operated under the University of Dhaka and Bangabandhu Sheikh Mujib Medical University (BSMMU) and received support from international organizations like the Norwegian Institute of Master Studies (NOMA) and the Rockefeller Foundation, USA.
address: 125, Technical Mor, 1 Darus Salam Rd, Dhaka 1216

post_title: Institute of Laser Surgery and Hospital
post_excerpt: Institute of Laser Surgery & Hospital is a pioneer in providing various minimally invasive laser surgical procedures and unique laser treatments in Bangladesh. With over 20 years of experience, we are a dedicated team of medical specialists in laser surgery,…
post_content:
Institute of Laser Surgery & Hospital is a pioneer in providing various minimally invasive laser surgical procedures and unique laser treatments in Bangladesh. With over 20 years of experience, we are a dedicated team of medical specialists in laser surgery, general surgery, orthopedics, and gynecology. We have successfully treated more than 25,000 patients, offering expert care and advanced treatments.

Our Services:

  1. PLDD for Neck and Back Pain due to disc prolapse.
  2. Core Decompression by Laser Osteoperforation for Avascular Necrosis (AVN) of the femoral head. A new treatment modality currently under research.
  3. Osteoperforation for Non-United Fractured Bones.
  4. Laser Vaporization (with or without conization) for chronic cervicitis, cervical erosion, and early-stage cervical cancer (Cervical Intraepithelial Neoplasia).
  5. Laser Vaginoplasty for urinary incontinence.
  6. Laser Vaporization of the Prostate.

In addition to these, we perform a wide range of general, laparoscopic, urological, orthopedic, and gynecological procedures. We are also involved in ongoing research programs endorsed by authoritative bodies and conduct regular awareness-building initiatives for the benefit of the public.

post_excerpt: The Govt Homoeopathic Medical College Hospital in Mirpur, Dhaka, was established in 1989 under the Bangladesh Homoeopathic Development Project of 1980. In 1993, it was integrated into the national revenue system as a 100-bed tertiary-level hospital, becoming the first and…
post_content:
The Govt Homoeopathic Medical College Hospital in Mirpur, Dhaka, was established in 1989 under the Bangladesh Homoeopathic Development Project of 1980. In 1993, it was integrated into the national revenue system as a 100-bed tertiary-level hospital, becoming the first and only government-run homeopathic hospital in Bangladesh.

The hospital offers a variety of services, including outdoor patient (OPD) care, emergency services, and departments for pathology and radiology. It serves a wide range of patients from all over the country, as well as many referred cases from different medical health services, providing specialized treatment through the homeopathic system.

One of the hospital’s unique features is its adherence to the principle of Totality of Symptoms, a core concept in homeopathy, where treatment is tailored to address the complete set of symptoms experienced by the patient. The hospital is equipped with the necessary facilities and conducts investigations as required for diagnosis. Additionally, it offers a broad range of homeopathic medicines, ensuring comprehensive care for its patients.
address: Mirpur -14, Tribeni road Rd No 9, Mirpur, Dhaka, 1206

post_title: Government Unani and Ayurvedic Medical College and Hospital
post_excerpt: The Government Unani and Ayurvedic Medical College and Hospital was established in 1985 with the vision of producing skilled and qualified Unani and Ayurvedic physicians as part of the "Development of the Indigenous System of Medicine" project. The academic session…
post_content:
The Government Unani and Ayurvedic Medical College and Hospital was established in 1985 with the vision of producing skilled and qualified Unani and Ayurvedic physicians as part of the “Development of the Indigenous System of Medicine” project. The academic session started in 1989-90 with 100 students, and the first class began on 10 March 1990.

Located on a three-acre campus in Mirpur 13, Dhaka, the college includes a college building, library, 100-bed hospital, production and research unit, girls’ hostel, staff quarters, and a mosque. The campus is well-secured and offers a conducive academic environment. The college offers a five-year BUMS (Bachelor of Unani Medicine and Surgery) and BMAS (Bachelor of Ayurvedic Medicine and Surgery) program, with a compulsory one-year internship. Both degrees are recognized in Bangladesh, and the institution is affiliated with the University of Dhaka.

The four-story college building is divided into Unani and Ayurvedic divisions, each containing classrooms, an anatomy dissection room, seminar halls, museums, laboratories, a large gallery, an audio-visual room, and a library. The three-story hospital, with 100 beds, provides emergency, outpatient, and inpatient services. The OPD consists of seven departments that serve an average of 200–250 patients daily.

The indoor department includes male and female wards. The hospital also has well-equipped departments for pathology, radiology, Panchakarma, acupuncture, family planning, yoga, and two dispensaries. The attached production and research unit manufactures high-quality Unani and Ayurvedic medicines for the treatment of OPD and IPD patients.

The hostel provides comfortable and well-equipped residential facilities for students, supporting both living and study needs. Staff members from outside the area are provided with fully-equipped quarters to ensure they can focus on teaching and training. Additionally, the institution boasts a well-maintained herbal garden with more than 100 species of medicinal plants, including rare species, for practical demonstrations to students.

post_title: Shahid Syed Nazrul Islam Medical College Hospital
post_excerpt: Shahid Syed Nazrul Islam Medical College was established in 2011, and it is named after Syed Nazrul Islam, the first acting President of Bangladesh. In the 2010–2011 period, the Bangladesh government approved a plan to set up four new medical…
post_content:
Shahid Syed Nazrul Islam Medical College was established in 2011, and it is named after Syed Nazrul Islam, the first acting President of Bangladesh.

In the 2010–2011 period, the Bangladesh government approved a plan to set up four new medical colleges in Jessore, Satkhira, Kishoreganj, and Kushtia to improve healthcare services across the country. The Executive Committee of the National Economic Council (ECNEC) endorsed the project, with an estimated budget of Tk 5.45 billion for the establishment of Shahid Syed Nazrul Islam Medical College.

The project included the construction of a six-story hospital building, a five-story academic building, a nurses’ training center, hostels for students and internee doctors, dormitories for doctors and staff nurses, a mosque, an auditorium, residential buildings for the principal and directors, a gymnasium, as well as the procurement of equipment, a micro-bus, two ambulances, and furniture.

post_content: Sheikh Hasina Medical College, Tangail, is a government medical school in Bangladesh, established in 2014. Located in the Kodalia area of Tangail city, the college was a promise made by Sheikh Hasina, the former Prime Minister and the current leader of the Bangladesh Awami League, during the 2008 election campaign. She pledged to establish a government-funded medical school in Tangail, which was fulfilled when her party secured a second consecutive term in 2014. In August 2014, the government decided to open Sheikh Hasina Medical College along with five other new medical colleges (Jamalpur Medical College, Manikganj Medical College, Shaheed M. Monsur Ali Medical College, Patuakhali Medical College, and Rangamati Medical College). SHMCT became the 24th public medical college in Bangladesh.

Satkhira Medical College (SMC) is a government medical college in Bangladesh, established in 2011. Located in the southwestern city of Satkhira, in Khulna Division, the college offers a five-year medical education program leading to an MBBS degree. After graduation, all students must complete a one-year mandatory internship. The degree awarded is recognized by the Bangladesh Medical and Dental Council.

post_excerpt: In the 1978-79 period, the Bangladesh government planned to establish medical colleges in various districts, including Bogra, Comilla, Dinajpur, Faridpur, Kushtia, Khulna, Noakhali, and Pabna, with the goal of improving healthcare services in the country. As part of this plan,…
post_content:
In the 1978-79 period, the Bangladesh government planned to establish medical colleges in various districts, including Bogra, Comilla, Dinajpur, Faridpur, Kushtia, Khulna, Noakhali, and Pabna, with the goal of improving healthcare services in the country. As part of this plan, medical colleges began operating in Comilla, Khulna, Pabna, and IPGMR (Dhaka) in the 1980-81 period. However, this initiative was later abandoned, and students were transferred to the already established medical colleges.

In 1991-92, the government recognized the need for additional medical colleges to ease the burden on the existing institutions and enhance medical education facilities in the country. Consequently, the government committed to establishing five new medical colleges in Dinajpur, Bogra, Khulna, Faridpur, and Comilla. These five medical colleges were successfully established in the 1999-91 period, each with an annual intake of 50 students.

Dinajpur Medical College began operating on 16 August 1992, initially occupying a hostel at a general government college and a rented private building called ‘Hamana Bhaban’. It moved to a new campus building at Anand Sagar area near Dinajpur town on 1 July 2000. Dinajpur Sadar Hospital served as the temporary medical college hospital during this time. The college moved into its new building on the campus on 7 March 2010. Currently, Dinajpur Medical College and Hospital boasts an excellent campus and has an annual intake of approximately 150 students.

post_excerpt: Cox's Bazar Medical College is a government medical school in Bangladesh, established in 2008, located in Cox's Bazar. The college admits 60 students each year for its five-year MBBS program, and currently, around 300 students are enrolled. The permanent campus,…
post_content:
Cox’s Bazar Medical College is a government medical school in Bangladesh, established in 2008, located in Cox’s Bazar. The college admits 60 students each year for its five-year MBBS program, and currently, around 300 students are enrolled.

The permanent campus, situated on a 30-acre area at Jhilongja, Cox’s Bazar, offers a pleasant environment for students. There are separate hostels for male and female students, equipped with all necessary facilities. The students gain practical experience at the 250-bed Cox’s Bazar District Sadar Hospital, which serves as the temporary Medical College Hospital and includes all the major branches of medical education.

At present, 76 teachers are working across various departments. Professor Dr. Anupam Barua is the current principal. The college is affiliated with Chittagong Medical University, and students receive their MBBS degree from Chittagong University upon completing their fifth year and passing the final Professional MBBS examination. The university conducts the professional exams, and the results are issued by them. In addition to university exams, internal assessments are held regularly, including card completions, term-end exams, and ongoing evaluations.
address: 33 KV Capacitor Bank Building, Chittagong - Cox's Bazar Hwy, Cox's Bazar 4700

A mandatory one-year internship follows graduation for all students. PkMC is linked with the 250-bed Patuakhali General Hospital for practical training and clinical experience.

post_content:
Chittagong General Hospital (also known as Chittagong 250 Bed General Hospital) (Bengali: চট্টগ্রাম জেনারেল হাসপাতাল) is a public hospital located in Chittagong, Bangladesh, with a 250-bed capacity. Since 1959, it has been affiliated with Chittagong Medical College.

The hospital was originally established as a dispensary in 1840 and later developed into a full-fledged hospital on Rangmahal Hill in Andarkilla, Chittagong. This hill has historical significance as part of the Arakani Fort, which was destroyed and set on fire by the Mughal Navy in 1666.

post_content:
Barisal General Hospital

Barisal General Hospital is one of the oldest and most renowned medical institutions in the Barishal district. Established in 1912, the hospital has a long-standing tradition of providing essential healthcare services to the region. Its registration code is 10001972, and it is a registered member of the Directorate General of Health Services (DGHS).

Facilities at Barisal General Hospital

  • Highly trained doctors and nurses: Our medical team is comprised of highly skilled professionals dedicated to delivering quality care.
  • Specialized care for seriously injured and ill patients: We have a qualified and specialized team to handle critical conditions and provide expert care.
  • Reliable medical materials and equipment: We ensure that all necessary medical supplies are available to support patient treatment.
  • Outsourced modern laundry service: Our hospital ensures the cleanliness and hygiene of all linens with a professional laundry service.
  • Separate wards for male and female patients: We provide gender-specific wards to ensure patient comfort and privacy.
  • Adequate toilet and bathroom facilities: Our hospital is equipped with clean and accessible restroom facilities for the comfort of patients.

At Barisal General Hospital, we are committed to offering exceptional healthcare and a safe, caring environment for our patients.

post_excerpt: Kuwait Bangladesh Hospital is a government hospital located in Dhaka, Bangladesh. Initially funded by the Kuwaiti Joint Relief Committee, it was established with the aim of providing essential healthcare services. The hospital is notably recognized as the first facility to…
post_content:
Kuwait Bangladesh Hospital is a government hospital located in Dhaka, Bangladesh. Initially funded by the Kuwaiti Joint Relief Committee, it was established with the aim of providing essential healthcare services. The hospital is notably recognized as the first facility to offer medical services to coronavirus patients in accordance with the guidelines set by the Government of Bangladesh.

The hospital was officially inaugurated on 10 June 2001 by Prime Minister Sheikh Hasina under the name Kuwait-Bangladesh Friendship Hospital. However, in 2002, the Kuwaiti Joint Relief Committee ceased its funding, citing financial difficulties. Following this, a lease agreement was signed on 16 December 2002 between the Ministry of Health and the American Hospital Consortium, which assumed responsibility for the hospital’s management. As part of the agreement, the hospital was renamed American Super Specialised Hospital, and the consortium was tasked with upgrading it to international standards by 30 June 2008.

Unfortunately, the consortium failed to meet this deadline. In 2009, the Bangladesh government filed a lawsuit against the American Hospital Consortium for illegally taking over the hospital’s rights, leaving the matter of the agreement’s cancellation unresolved. After years of legal battles, a court ruling in 2015 favored the government, and the Ministry of Health regained control of the hospital.
address: 319 Isakha Avenue,Road-6,Beside Rajuk College, Uttara Paschim, Dhaka, 1231

post_title: Shaheed Ahsan Ullah Master General Hospital
post_excerpt: Shaheed Ahsan Ullah Master General Hospital is a government-run hospital located in Gazipur, Bangladesh. This hospital was built on the land of the former Tongi General Hospital. After the construction of the new building, the hospital was renamed in 2017…
post_content:
Shaheed Ahsan Ullah Master General Hospital is a government-run hospital located in Gazipur, Bangladesh.

This hospital was built on the land of the former Tongi General Hospital. After the construction of the new building, the hospital was renamed in 2017 to honor Ahsanullah Master, following a government notification issued a couple of months after the inauguration. However, despite the new building, the hospital faced several challenges. Due to the lack of modern equipment, insufficient medical staff, and other operational issues, the new building remained underutilized for patient care even a year after its opening.

The hospital has been the subject of various complaints over the years. In 2020, it served as one of the COVID-19 testing centers. On April 25, 2021, a surgeon at the hospital tragically passed away from the coronavirus. That same year, the hospital also became one of the dedicated centers for treating dengue patients.

In 2022, there were reports of corruption when three individuals were arrested for obstructing the submission of hospital tenders, further highlighting ongoing administrative issues.

The center is equipped with state-of-the-art, fully computerized analyzers for Hormone and Immunology, Biochemistry, Hematology, Serology, Coagulation, and also offers facilities for Histopathology, Cytology, Microbiology, Video Endoscopy, Digital E.E.G, Blood Culture (Fan Method), and Electrophoresis of Hb & Protein. In addition, it provides advanced diagnostic tools like digital X-ray, OPG, Mammography, 4D USG, Bronchoscopy, Colposcopy, Echo, Color Doppler, ETT, ECG, Holter Monitor, 128-slice CT Scan, and the first 1.5T & 18-channel double unit MRI in Bangladesh.

Ibn Sina also offers comprehensive health check-up services, including General Health Check-up, Executive Health Check-up, Cardiac Health Check-up, and Diabetic Health Check-up. For diabetic patients, the center operates a dedicated Diabetic Center that provides continuous support to ensure better management of diabetes.

post_content:
Welcome to Moon Hospital, established in 1996 and dedicated to providing multidisciplinary medical care in the heart of Jhawtola, Cumilla. With a commitment to team-based, high-quality patient care, we are proud to be recognized as one of the best hospitals in the region.

Today, Moon Hospital is one of the largest healthcare facilities in eastern Bangladesh, offering 150 beds to cater to the growing healthcare needs. As a multi-specialty private hospital, we provide a wide range of medical services across 21 specialized departments, backed by advanced automated pathology services, histopathology, vaccination, and state-of-the-art diagnostic services.

Our services include MRI (coming soon), CT scans, angiogram, angiography, CCU, ICU, NICU, kidney dialysis, and 4D ultrasound with colour Doppler and ECHO. We also offer a well-equipped physiotherapy unit, a surgery unit with high hygiene standards, and a laser & chemotherapy center. With centralized oxygen supply and a 24-hour no-wait emergency care service, our dedicated duty doctors and nurses are committed to providing the best possible healthcare experience for our patients.

post_title: Ispahani Islamia Eye Institute and Hospital
post_excerpt: Islamia Eye Hospital, a renowned institution in Bangladesh, has been providing quality eye care for over 50 years. As the country's largest multi-specialty eye hospital, it ensures that people from all socio-economic backgrounds receive the same high standard of treatment,…
post_content:
Islamia Eye Hospital, a renowned institution in Bangladesh, has been providing quality eye care for over 50 years. As the country’s largest multi-specialty eye hospital, it ensures that people from all socio-economic backgrounds receive the same high standard of treatment, although the facilities offered vary according to the patient’s preferences. The hospital provides both general low-cost services and private, more upscale options for those seeking added comfort.

Founded as a charitable dispensary by the philanthropist and industrialist Mr. M. A. Ispahani, Islamia Eye Hospital officially opened in 1960 as Bangladesh’s first eye hospital. Remaining a non-profit organization throughout its history, it has not only offered essential eye care but also pioneered various specialized treatments in ophthalmology.

In addition to its medical services, Islamia Eye Hospital took the lead in training ophthalmologists and medical staff. In 1992, the M. A. Ispahani Institute of Ophthalmology was established to offer advanced training in ophthalmology to both doctors and healthcare workers.

To further expand its impact, Islamia has recently opened three branch hospitals in remote areas of Bangladesh (Jamalpur, Barisal, and Naogaon) as part of the “Creating Access to Eye Care Services for Rural People” project, supported by ORBIS International. This initiative aims to bring eye care to underserved rural communities.

post_excerpt: Welcome to Bangladesh Institute of Health Sciences General Hospital. Bangladesh Diabetic Somity (BADAS) has earned international recognition for its innovative diabetes healthcare model, known as the Ibrahim Model. Recently, the efforts of BADAS have made significant progress with the launch…
post_content:
Welcome to Bangladesh Institute of Health Sciences General Hospital. Bangladesh Diabetic Somity (BADAS) has earned international recognition for its innovative diabetes healthcare model, known as the Ibrahim Model. Recently, the efforts of BADAS have made significant progress with the launch of a large-scale initiative, the Health Care Development Project (HCDP). This project is supported by the Government of Bangladesh, the Dutch Government, and a consortium of local banks.

Bangladesh Institute of Health Sciences (BIHS) serves as the apex institute of the HCDP and operates its associated hospital, BIHS General Hospital. BIHS is dedicated to providing high-quality inpatient and outpatient care, along with diagnostic services, all at reasonable costs.

To expand its diabetes and general healthcare services, BIHS General Hospital is conveniently located in Darus Salam, Mirpur-1.

post_excerpt: Among the 3.3 million births each year in the country, around 650,000 newborns are born prematurely. While 20% of full-term babies and 60% of premature babies require hospitalization, the reality is that every day, there is a need for the…
post_content:
Among the 3.3 million births each year in the country, around 650,000 newborns are born prematurely. While 20% of full-term babies and 60% of premature babies require hospitalization, the reality is that every day, there is a need for the admission of 15,000 newborns. However, we can only accommodate 2,000-3,000 babies across both public and private hospitals.

The availability of well-equipped NICU (Neonatal Intensive Care Units) and KMC (Kangaroo Mother Care) facilities is very limited, with only a few well-equipped units in public hospitals and even fewer in private ones. Tragically, many babies die either on the way to the hospital or in inadequately equipped NICUs, under the care of untrained healthcare providers.

Another critical issue is the fate of motherless and street newborns. Every year, around 7,000 mothers lose their lives due to childbirth complications, leaving their precious newborns orphaned. Unfortunately, no one is taking proper responsibility for these vulnerable infants. While some NGOs are working to support healthy newborns at the community level, there is no focused effort on caring for sick newborns.

This highlights the urgent need for well-equipped Neonatal ICUs to prevent unnecessary neonatal deaths and provide proper care for our most vulnerable infants.
address: Hospital Tower, House # E-206/1, Signboard Mor, Narayangonj-1430.

post_excerpt: Lung rehabilitation is a group activity where patients with lung conditions come together to exercise and work on restoring their lung strength. Working in a group setting provides encouragement, as patients motivate and support one another. Through this program, patients…
post_content:
Lung rehabilitation is a group activity where patients with lung conditions come together to exercise and work on restoring their lung strength. Working in a group setting provides encouragement, as patients motivate and support one another. Through this program, patients will learn how to stay healthy by exercising and managing their illness.

Lung rehabilitation is carried out by a team that may include doctors, nurses, physiotherapists, and trainers. These activities help improve breathing, enhance quality of life, and reduce the need for emergency treatments and hospitalizations. After completing the rehabilitation program, many patients are able to return to their previous activities, even if they had previously been affected by conditions like COPD or shortness of breath.

post_content:
The Ibn Sina Trust began its journey in April 1981 with the noble vision “To serve humanity.” The trust was founded with the aim of providing affordable healthcare services to the people of Bangladesh. In its early days, a group of dedicated social workers united with a strong determination to serve the people of the country. This vision was realized through the establishment of “The Ibn Sina Trust.”

At the time of its founding, the trust had only 13 employees, including physicians, technical, and administrative staff. Over time, by the grace of Almighty Allah Subhanahu Wa Tala, Ibn Sina Trust has grown into a respected name in Bangladesh’s healthcare sector and has become one of the largest healthcare providers in South Asia.

post_excerpt: Shaheed Suhrawardy Medical College (ShSMC) is the 14th government medical college in Bangladesh, established in 2006. Located in the north-western part of Dhaka, beside the National Parliament House, the college boasts a unique architectural campus and an excellent academic environment.…
post_content:
Shaheed Suhrawardy Medical College (ShSMC) is the 14th government medical college in Bangladesh, established in 2006. Located in the north-western part of Dhaka, beside the National Parliament House, the college boasts a unique architectural campus and an excellent academic environment.

Shaheed Suhrawardy Medical College Hospital has a long history of providing healthcare services and has supported the establishment and growth of many medical institutions. The college is committed to offering top-class medical education, exceptional training, and quality research, guided by its team of eminent and experienced teachers.

The Shaheed Suhrawardy Hospital was originally established in 1963 as Ayub Hospital during the period of East Pakistan to provide outdoor services. Equipped with pathology and radiology support, the hospital later expanded to offer indoor services, starting with 5 beds and later growing to 25 beds.

After Bangladesh’s independence in 1971, the hospital was renamed Shaheed Suhrawardy Hospital in honor of Hossain Shaheed Suhrawardy, a prominent figure in the fight for democracy. The hospital, designed by the renowned architect Louis I. Kahn—who also designed the National Assembly Hall of Bangladesh—is recognized for its architectural beauty. Over time, the hospital grew into a general hospital, serving as a central referral center for patients from northern and western Bangladesh.

Recognizing the need for expanding undergraduate medical education, the Bangladesh government decided in 2005 to establish Shaheed Suhrawardy Medical College on the same campus, with the hospital being upgraded to a Medical College Hospital. The college officially began its academic activities on May 6, 2006, with 100 freshman students. The college building, including hostels, was rapidly constructed and inaugurated on January 17, 2012, by Sheikh Hasina, the Honorable Prime Minister of Bangladesh.

In addition to the medical college, a nursing institute is currently under development. Furthermore, to broaden the scope of medical education, the college launched a BDS (Dentistry) course in 2011, admitting about 50 students each year. The Dentistry Department has its own independent units, including classrooms, a library, laboratories, hostels, and facilities for specialized training.

post_content:
The Ibn Sina Trust began its journey in April 1981 with the noble vision “To serve humanity.” The trust was founded with the aim of providing affordable healthcare services to the people of Bangladesh. In its early days, a group of dedicated social workers came together with a strong commitment to serve the people of the country. This vision was realized in the form of “The Ibn Sina Trust.”

At the time of its establishment, the trust operated with just 13 employees, including physicians, technical, and administrative staff. Over the years, and by the grace of Almighty Allah Subhanahu Wa Tala, Ibn Sina Trust has become a respected name in the healthcare sector of Bangladesh and is now one of the largest healthcare providers in South Asia.

The trust serves the people of Bangladesh through a reputed Medical College, a renowned Nursing Institute, and specialized hospitals, including a 300-bed hospital, along with two general hospitals with 300 and 50 beds. Additionally, Ibn Sina Trust is highly regarded for its diagnostic and investigative services. The trust is ISO certified and boasts one of the most well-equipped laboratories in the country. The laboratory and imaging reports from Ibn Sina Diagnostic Centers are widely accepted in Singapore General Hospital, Mount Elizabeth Hospital Singapore, Bumrungrad International Hospital Thailand, and other reputed hospitals across Asia.

This reputation has been earned through the use of the latest analyzers and imaging technologies in Ibn Sina Diagnostic Centers. The center is supported by highly educated and experienced consultants who specialize in their fields, many of whom hold degrees from Europe and North America.

Ibn Sina Trust is dedicated to introducing the latest advancements in medical science from Germany, Europe, and North America. Our laboratory is equipped with a 3 Tesla Biometric MRI, a 128-slice CT scan machine, and other state-of-the-art imaging and laboratory machinery. Notably, these advanced machines were introduced well ahead of many other countries in South Asia. We take pride in our partnerships with world-renowned suppliers such as Siemens (Germany), General Electric (USA), Olympus (Japan), Kiazon (Japan), Nihonkoden (Japan), and Fuji (Japan).
address: 1-2 floors, Ma Plaza , Model Town, Aga Nagar Union Parishad Hospital Rd, Dhaka-1310,

নিউরোজেন-কে বাংলাদেশে জেনেটিক সায়েন্সের উন্নয়ন যাত্রার অগ্রদূত বলা হয়ে থাকে। আমাদের কার্যক্রম অনেক বহুমুখী। আমরা অটিজমে আক্রান্ত শিশুদের মানসিক স্বাস্থ্যের উন্নয়নে বিভিন্ন ধরনের অ্যাসেসমেন্ট, থেরাপি, এবং জেনেটিক কাউন্সেলিং প্রদান করি। এছাড়া, ব্রেস্ট এবং ওভারিয়ান ক্যান্সার হওয়ার সম্ভাবনা এবং লাং ক্যান্সার কোন জীনের ত্রুটির কারণে হয়ে থাকে তা নির্ধারণ এবং নিরাময়ের কাজও করি।

আমরা বাংলাদেশের প্রথম এবং একমাত্র জেনেটিক টেস্টিং ল্যাবরেটরি স্থাপন করেছি, যেখানে বিভিন্ন সংক্রামক এবং দুর্লভ অসুখ হওয়ার সম্ভাবনা নির্ণয় এবং তাদের প্রতিকার নিয়ে গবেষণা করা হয়। নিউরোজেন দেশের মানুষের জন্য অত্যাধুনিক জেনেটিক সেবা প্রদান করে, যা তাদের স্বাস্থ্য উন্নয়ন এবং রোগ প্রতিরোধে সহায়ক।
address: Eastern Dolan, Level - 4 ( 3rd Floor 152/2-H,Bir Uttam Kazi Nuruzzaman Sarak West Panthapath, Former, Green Rd, Dhaka-1205

post_title: Ibn Sina Medical College Hospital | Kallyanpur
post_excerpt: The Ibn Sina Trust began its journey in April 1981 with the noble vision of “To serve humanity.” The trust was established with the goal of providing healthcare services to the people of Bangladesh at an affordable cost. In the…
post_content:
The Ibn Sina Trust began its journey in April 1981 with the noble vision of “To serve humanity.” The trust was established with the goal of providing healthcare services to the people of Bangladesh at an affordable cost. In the early days, a group of dedicated social workers in Bangladesh united with a strong determination to serve their fellow citizens. This vision was realized through the creation of “The Ibn Sina Trust.”

When it was first launched, the trust had just 13 employees, including physicians, technical staff, and administrative personnel. Over the years, and by the grace of Almighty Allah Subhanahu Wa Tala, The Ibn Sina Trust has grown to become a well-known and trusted name in the healthcare sector of Bangladesh. Today, it is one of the largest healthcare service providers in South Asia, continuing to fulfill its mission of providing accessible healthcare to those in need.
_yoast_wpseo_metadesc: Explore the doctor list at Ibn Sina Medical College Hospital Kallyanpur, featuring specialists in kidney, vascular, orthopedics, and more. Located at 1/1 B, Kallyanpur, Dhaka. Contact 09610009616 for appointments and quality, affordable care since 1981.

post_excerpt: Delta Hospital Limited (DHL) is a pioneering organization in Bangladesh, known for providing general medical treatment as well as specializing in cancer diagnosis, treatment, and management in the private sector. The hospital offers a comprehensive range of services, including radiation…
post_content:
Delta Hospital Limited (DHL) is a pioneering organization in Bangladesh, known for providing general medical treatment as well as specializing in cancer diagnosis, treatment, and management in the private sector. The hospital offers a comprehensive range of services, including radiation therapy, diagnostic facilities, chemotherapy, and surgery, supported by a team of experienced consultants, pathologists, surgeons, medical oncologists, radiation oncologists, and other specialists.

The diagnostic services at DHL are run by internationally reputed pathologists with over 50 years of experience, along with a team of highly qualified personnel and a full range of diagnostic facilities. The radiology department is equipped with qualified clinicians and advanced facilities, including digital X-rays, ultrasonography, and CT scans.

Using state-of-the-art equipment, our specialists provide the best possible radiation therapy at our centers. Our Radiation Oncologists actively participate in international conferences and meetings, ensuring that our patients receive the most up-to-date and appropriate care. All patients are managed using a multidisciplinary approach by our team of cancer specialists.

The oncology unit, in collaboration with the Bangladesh University of Engineering and Technology (BUET) and the German Society of Radiation Physicists, regularly organizes workshops on quality assurance in radiation oncology. It is also notable that the oncology unit of DHL has been chosen by BUET, Gonobishaw Biddalay, and the Biomedical Engineering Department of Dhaka University for training and research purposes. These institutions provide training for M.Phil, Ph.D. students, and radiotherapy technologists. Additionally, DHL offers training and internship opportunities for nurses from various nursing colleges.

post_title: Labaid Cancer Hospital And Super Speciality Centre
post_excerpt: Welcome to Labaid Cancer Hospital & Super Speciality Centre, a state-of-the-art healthcare facility dedicated to providing comprehensive cancer treatment services in Bangladesh. The hospital was founded by Dr. A M Shamim, who recognized the critical need for high-quality cancer care…
post_content:
Welcome to Labaid Cancer Hospital & Super Speciality Centre, a state-of-the-art healthcare facility dedicated to providing comprehensive cancer treatment services in Bangladesh. The hospital was founded by Dr. A M Shamim, who recognized the critical need for high-quality cancer care in the country, leading to the establishment of LABAID Diagnostic. Today, the LABAID Group is one of the leading healthcare providers in Bangladesh, known for delivering exceptional services in the healthcare industry.

We take great pride in our commitment to patient care, which is why we are pleased to announce the opening of our fully-equipped cancer hospital. Our hospital offers a wide range of modern cancer treatment options, including chemotherapy, immunotherapy, hormone therapy, gene therapy, and advanced radiotherapy techniques such as 3DCRT, IMRT, IGRT, Rapid arc, SRS, SBRT, and Brachytherapy.

In addition to these, we offer super-specialty in-patient departments, a daycare center, palliative care, a psychotherapy center, and 24/7 emergency pharmacy services. Our dedicated team of oncology specialists includes experts in medical, radiation, surgical, and gynecological oncology, as well as medical physicists, radiologists, pediatric oncologists, and haemato-oncologists.

The hospital is also equipped with a fully-equipped pathology lab, ICU, HDU, 8 modular advanced OT facilities, and a dialysis center. At Labaid Cancer Hospital & Super Speciality Centre, we are committed to providing the best care possible, with a focus on personalized attention to ensure that every patient receives the highest quality treatment. With our state-of-the-art facilities and expert healthcare professionals, we aim to set a new standard in cancer treatment in the sub-continent.

post_content: KC Hospital & Diagnostic Centre, a concern of NIPA Group, is a 150-bed tertiary care hospital located in Dakkhinkhan, Uttara, Dhaka. The hospital is dedicated to serving the people of Dakkhinkhan, Uttara, and the greater portion of the city. The hospital building spans 11 stories and covers approximately 110,000 sqft. The outpatient department is capable of serving up to 400 patients daily, with 25 examination rooms available. To ensure the best healthcare and hospitality, the hospital closely monitors patient waiting times across various areas, including outpatient clinics, emergency services, and admissions, providing a comfortable and efficient experience for everyone.

post_title: Ahsania Mission Cancer And General Hospital (Uttara)
post_excerpt: Building on the vision of the founder, Sufi Saint Hazrat Khan Bahadur Ahsanullah (Rahmatullah Alaihee), Dhaka Ahsania Mission embarked on creating a modern cancer hospital where world-class treatment could be provided. Ahsania Mission Cancer and General Hospital is one of…
post_content: Building on the vision of the founder, Sufi Saint Hazrat Khan Bahadur Ahsanullah (Rahmatullah Alaihee), Dhaka Ahsania Mission embarked on creating a modern cancer hospital where world-class treatment could be provided. Ahsania Mission Cancer and General Hospital is one of the key projects in the fight against cancer in Bangladesh. As part of this initiative, Dhaka Ahsania Mission opened a Cancer Detection & Treatment Center in Mirpur, Dhaka in 2001. Over the years, it has evolved into a 42-bed cancer hospital, offering essential services such as operation facilities, chemotherapy, and X-ray and imaging. The hospital is staffed by a team of experienced cancer specialists and general physicians, who provide healthcare services at an affordable cost. Additionally, free services are provided to poor and ultra-poor patients. Since its inception in 2001, the hospital has consistently delivered healthcare services, with a special focus on treating cancer patients.
address: Plot-03 , Embankment Drive Way, Sector-10 , Uttara Model Town, Dhaka-1230

post_content: Building on the vision of the founder, Sufi Saint Hazrat Khan Bahadur Ahsanullah (Rahmatullah Alaihee), Dhaka Ahsania Mission set out to establish a modern cancer hospital where world-class treatment would be available. Ahsania Mission Cancer and General Hospital is one of the major initiatives in Bangladesh’s fight against cancer. In 2001, as part of this initiative, Dhaka Ahsania Mission opened a Cancer Detection & Treatment Center in Mirpur, Dhaka. Over time, this center has developed into a 42-bed cancer hospital, equipped with essential facilities such as operation theaters, chemotherapy, and X-ray and imaging services. A team of experienced and dedicated cancer specialists, alongside general physicians, work tirelessly to provide healthcare services at affordable costs. The hospital also offers free services to the poor and ultra-poor patients. Since its establishment in 2001, the hospital has continued to offer vital healthcare, especially to cancer patients, and remains a beacon of hope for many in need.
address: Plot: M-1/C, Section 14, Khan Bahadur Ahsanullah Road, Mirpur, Dhaka-1216

post_title: Khwaja Yunus Ali Medical College & Hospital
post_excerpt: Khwaja Yunus Ali Medical College & Hospital (KYAMCH) is a prominent healthcare institution located in Enayetpur, Sirajganj district, approximately 147 kilometers from Dhaka. Established on May 17, 2004, the college is situated on a vast 127-acre campus, making it one…
post_content:
Khwaja Yunus Ali Medical College & Hospital (KYAMCH) is a prominent healthcare institution located in Enayetpur, Sirajganj district, approximately 147 kilometers from Dhaka. Established on May 17, 2004, the college is situated on a vast 127-acre campus, making it one of the largest in Southeast Asia.

The institution operates as a non-profit entity, registered under the Society Act of Bangladesh and overseen by a Trustee Board. The Trustee Members primarily fund KYAMCH, and any income generated is utilized for maintenance, development, education, and research purposes.

Kyamch

KYAMCH offers a five-year MBBS program leading to a Bachelor of Medicine, Bachelor of Surgery degree, affiliated with the University of Rajshahi. The curriculum is governed by the regulations of the Bangladesh Medical & Dental Council (BM&DC). The college is also associated with a 500-bed teaching hospital, providing comprehensive medical services to the community.

MBBS Bangladesh

The campus is equipped with modern facilities, including a well-stocked library, separate hostels for local and foreign students, and a range of extracurricular activities. KYAMCH is committed to delivering quality medical education and healthcare services, adhering to the vision of its founder, Dr. M. M. Amjad Hussain.

We began our journey in 2005 with United Hospital Bangladesh, driven by our motto to provide quality healthcare services to our patients. We take pride in providing a variety of services under one roof, including a medical day care center, dentistry, a child development center, physical medicine & rehabilitation, pharmacy, and vaccination facilities. Furthermore, Medix features a state-of-the-art dialysis and chemotherapy center, offering a wide range of clinical services.

We also have a broad range of diagnostic laboratories to ensure that our patients receive timely and accurate results. At Medix, we are committed to delivering the right healthcare when it’s needed most, bringing hope and healing to our patients and their families. Patients trust us with their most valuable possession—their lives—and we are dedicated to providing healing and support to every individual who comes to us.

post_excerpt: Labaid is one of the largest and most well-recognized private healthcare brands in Bangladesh. Known for pioneering the country's first super-specialty cardiac hospital, Labaid has also earned widespread recognition for offering high-quality diagnostic and specialized consultation services under one roof.…
post_content:
Labaid is one of the largest and most well-recognized private healthcare brands in Bangladesh. Known for pioneering the country’s first super-specialty cardiac hospital, Labaid has also earned widespread recognition for offering high-quality diagnostic and specialized consultation services under one roof. With centers across Bangladesh, Labaid handles around 3 million patient encounters annually, employs nearly 8,000 staff members, and works with almost 1,000 top-notch consultant physicians nationwide.

Under the visionary leadership of Dr. A M Shamim, a physician-entrepreneur, Labaid has transformed the private healthcare sector in Bangladesh over the last 35 years. By providing a platform for home-grown physicians and medical practitioners, Labaid has set up centers of excellence, changing the collective mindset about healthcare in Bangladesh. Today, people believe that complex treatments like transplantation and cardiovascular surgeries can be performed successfully by Bangladeshi doctors with excellent outcomes.

In its constant effort to add value to the lives of the people of Bangladesh, Labaid has expanded into other sectors over the years. It established a pharmaceutical plant to ensure the availability of quality medicines for the masses, set up tertiary-level education institutes to bridge the gap in skilled human resources for healthcare and other industries, and developed Labaid Properties to provide modern homes and infrastructure. Labaid Agros was also created to provide organic and quality food for patients and customers alike.

Labaid is a name that inspires trust—an institution that people rely on to fulfill their everyday needs and aspirations. Labaid takes immense pride in its achievements and continues to strive towards its goal of being a Home of Trust.
address: Rahaman Arcadia, House-B65, DIT Avenue, Malibagh Chowdhury Para Rd, Dhaka-1217

post_excerpt: A charitable fund called "Sadaqah Tahbil" was established on July 4, 1983, shortly after the inception of Islami Bank on March 30, 1983. This was in line with the decision of the Bank’s Board of Directors and pursuant to clause…
post_content: A charitable fund called “Sadaqah Tahbil” was established on July 4, 1983, shortly after the inception of Islami Bank on March 30, 1983. This was in line with the decision of the Bank’s Board of Directors and pursuant to clause 104 of its Memorandum and Articles of Association. Over time, as the scope of its activities expanded, Sadaqah Tahbil was renamed “Islami Bank Foundation” on May 20, 1991. Since then, the Islami Bank Foundation has operated as a subsidiary of Islami Bank Bangladesh Limited, maintaining separate accounts and administration. The foundation is officially registered with the Registrar of Joint Stock Companies and Firms of the Government of the People’s Republic of Bangladesh under registration number S-1214 (25) 1988, dated 25-06-88. It is also registered with the NGO Affairs Bureau under the registration number 668, dated 24-11-92.
address: al Bhaba30, Islami Bank Hospitn, VIP Rd, Dhaka, Dhaka-1000

post_excerpt: The journey of Bangladesh ENT Hospital began in 1997 under the leadership of Prof. Mohammad Abdullah, Prof. A. F. Mohiuddin Khan, Dr. Salehuddin Sayeed, and Dr. Bulbul, with Prof. M. A. Majed serving as the chairman. In 1998, Prof. Md.…
post_content:
The journey of Bangladesh ENT Hospital began in 1997 under the leadership of Prof. Mohammad Abdullah, Prof. A. F. Mohiuddin Khan, Dr. Salehuddin Sayeed, and Dr. Bulbul, with Prof. M. A. Majed serving as the chairman. In 1998, Prof. Md. Zillur Rahman, Prof. Khorshed Alam Majumder, and Dr. M.A. Jalil joined the team, followed by Dr. Ahmed Raquib, Dr. Md. Abbas Uddin, and Dr. Abu Kaiser. Initially, the hospital operated from a rented house on Satmasjid Road with limited space and facilities, but the founders had a clear vision: to establish a fully equipped, modern hospital specializing in ENT and Head Neck Surgery.

Over the years, the hospital moved through four different locations within the Dhanmondi Residential Area, and it was renamed Bangladesh ENT Hospital. Finally, on November 1st, 2015, the hospital found its permanent home at its own premises, covering an area of 14,300 sq. ft. The new facility is centrally air-conditioned, offering a comfortable and accessible environment for both patients and surgeons.

Today, Bangladesh ENT Hospital is a leading private facility specializing in ENT, with a dedicated team of fifty renowned consultants in various fields, including ENT, anaesthesia, cancer care, maxillofacial & dental surgery, neurosurgery, and gynecology & obstetrics. The hospital has earned a stellar reputation in ENT and related disciplines, with its team of specialists recognized for their expertise and commitment to high-quality patient care.
address: Navana Newbury place(3rd floor) Opposite to Rapa Plaza,Near 27 No. Bus Stand, 4/1/A Sobahanbag Mirpur Road, 3, Dhanmondi, Dhaka-1205

post_title: Anwer Khan Modern Medical College Hospital
post_excerpt: Anwer Khan Modern Hospital Limited, part of the Modern Group, is a state-of-the-art 750-bed hospital equipped with the latest world-class medical technology. Located at House #17 & 17/1, Road #8, Dhanmondi, Dhaka-1205, the hospital sits on a spacious 45-katha plot…
post_content:
Anwer Khan Modern Hospital Limited, part of the Modern Group, is a state-of-the-art 750-bed hospital equipped with the latest world-class medical technology. Located at House #17 & 17/1, Road #8, Dhanmondi, Dhaka-1205, the hospital sits on a spacious 45-katha plot with a seven-storey building. In addition to the main hospital, we have acquired ten adjacent buildings to expand our services. Mr. Anwer Hossain Khan, the Chairman and Managing Director, oversees the hospital’s operations, which are backed by a team of highly reputable doctors and skilled, diploma-holding nurses focused on delivering top-quality care.

In the highly competitive field of modern healthcare, staying ahead is key, and Anwer Khan Modern Hospital continuously invests in the latest medical equipment and technology. With over two hundred renowned specialists, the hospital is equipped to tackle any healthcare challenge. The hospital is also planning to introduce Research & Development (R&D) facilities to innovate in disease prevention and treatment.

The hospital offers more than forty specialized medical departments, including medicine, neurology, neurosurgery, cardiology, obstetrics and gynecology (including infertility treatment), pediatrics, general surgery, orthopedics, gastroenterology, ENT, urology, ophthalmology, nephrology, dermatology, thoracic surgery, radiation oncology, rheumatology, microbiology, psychiatry, physiotherapy, and more.

Anwer Khan Modern Hospital, along with Anwer Khan Modern Medical College, Modern Diagnostic Centre, and Anwer Khan Modern Nursing College, operates across twelve buildings, covering nearly 400,000 square feet of space. We also have four vacant plots of land near the hospital for future expansion. In the near future, we plan to open new branches in Uttara and Mirpur, and further extend our services to Chittagong, Chandpur, and Dinajpur. Additionally, we are developing a ten-storey building at Halisohar, Chittagong, fully funded by our own resources.

post_content: Bangabandhu Sheikh Mujib Medical University (BSMMU) is the premier postgraduate medical institution in Bangladesh. It has a rich heritage as the successor of the Institute of Postgraduate Medical Research (IPGMR), which was established in December 1965. In 1998, the government upgraded IPGMR into a medical university to expand the facilities for higher medical education and research in the country. BSMMU is widely recognised for its excellence in medical education, training, research, and healthcare services, making it a leader in the field.

ঢাকার ধানমন্ডিতে অবস্থিত পপুলার ডায়াগনস্টিক সেন্টার লিমিটেড একটি স্বনামধন্য এবং পূর্ণাঙ্গ মেডিক্যাল সেবা প্রদানকারী প্রতিষ্ঠান। এখানে আধুনিক চিকিৎসা সরঞ্জাম এবং অভিজ্ঞ ডাক্তারদের সমন্বয়ে রোগীদের জন্য সর্বোচ্চ মানের স্বাস্থ্যসেবা নিশ্চিত করা হয়। ধানমন্ডি শাখায় মেডিসিন, কার্ডিওলজি, গ্যাস্ট্রোএন্টারোলজি, নিউরোলজি, ডার্মাটোলজি, ইউরোলজি সহ বিভিন্ন বিষয়ে বিশেষজ্ঞ চিকিৎসকরা নিয়মিত চেম্বার করেন।

রোগীরা সহজেই অনলাইন বা সরাসরি এসে অ্যাপয়েন্টমেন্ট বুক করতে পারেন। নির্ভুল রোগ নির্ণয়, স্ক্যান, টেস্ট, এবং বিশেষজ্ঞ পরামর্শের জন্য ধানমন্ডি ব্রাঞ্চ একটি নির্ভরযোগ্য গন্তব্য। নিয়মিত চেকআপ, দীর্ঘমেয়াদী রোগ ব্যবস্থাপনা অথবা বিশেষ চিকিৎসার প্রয়োজনে পপুলার ডায়াগনস্টিক সেন্টার ধানমন্ডি আপনাকে সঠিক এবং পেশাদার সেবা প্রদান করতে প্রতিশ্রুতিবদ্ধ।

post_content: Health is such an important issue worldwide that even the most developed countries put special emphasis on this sector, making it a priority to secure the health of their citizens. Despite the profitability of many of these initiatives, they often fail to benefit the common people. This happens either due to the high cost of healthcare or because it is not easily accessible, especially in emergencies. In Dhaka City, for example, heavy traffic makes it even harder to reach hospitals quickly when immediate medical attention is needed. With this in mind, there’s a need for better healthcare solutions that are affordable and easily accessible to everyone.

Monowara Hospital (Pvt.) Ltd. is a distinguished multi-hospital system located in Dhaka City. The hospital features a modern surgical suite equipped with three fully advanced operation theatres, capable of supporting a wide range of surgeries, including laparoscopic and endoscopic procedures.

The hospital offers a variety of room options, including standard, private, and deluxe accommodations, all designed to ensure the highest level of comfort and convenience. Each room is outfitted with premium fittings and state-of-the-art equipment, providing an optimal environment for patient care. Additionally, the hospital is equipped with a nurses’ call system, television, telephone, and an oxygen supply system to further enhance the comfort and well-being of patients.
